ops.note: scripts/trust-fixtures.sh (commit df1f4bbd) builds internal/trustfixture and signs three variants: fixture-devid-a / fixture-devid-b (Developer ID SXKCTF23Q2, distinct identifiers com.yasyf.daemonkit.fixture-{a,b}, hardened runtime, timestamped, full chain leaf→Developer ID CA→Apple Root CA) + fixture-adhoc (no team) — covering identifier-mismatch and no-team rejection. Bare signed Mach-Os, sufficient for SecCode audit-token DR checks (.app form only matters for TCC, out of trust-E2E scope). Signing is non-interactive on this host.
